input.body: Our clinically proven supplement melts fat fast.
input.headline: Lose 20 pounds in 30 days guaranteed

reviewer_rationale: Preferred rewrite should remove quantified and guaranteed weight-loss claims, keep a wellness/nutrition intent, and add variability language.

input.body: Join our wellness newsletter for science-backed sleep tips.

reviewer_rationale: Preferred rewrite should keep the sleep-routine context while shifting the action to privacy and consent review.

input.body: Our breakthrough treatment cures pain without doctors.

reviewer_rationale: Preferred rewrite should avoid cure claims, reduce urgency, and preserve a general wellness-support intent with professional-consult language.
